message:
Merge PR #2600: feat: prime SSOT tasks 8-12 — init upgrade, recipe cleanup, symlink safety, staleness detection

Completes prime SSOT feature (#2139). bd init now upgrades legacy
beads sections to versioned format with profile+hash markers.
Adds symlink safety, profile precedence (full over minimal),
staleness detection, recipe template cleanup, and 9 new tests.

Closes #2139

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/2600
Author: maphew
